scope: Caller-oriented parameter total table for the two Tencent Video main interfaces, focused on what to fill, what capability it unlocks, how to tell success from a thin shell, and which environment claims are still open.
caution: This table is optimized for direct callers in the currently tested anonymous direct-call scope plus the later real anonymous visitor-cookie replay where explicitly noted.
It is not proof that aged-cookie or login-state environments behave the same.
When a row says environment_open or branch_partially_closed, keep the canonical documented branch unless you are deliberately probing that branch family.
For the first aged-cookie/login-state replay round, a PC Web cookie header is the true minimum input; mobile H5 cookie input is optional at the current builder-contract level.

api1.recommended_fill_strategy: For stable direct calls, use the canonical documented branch tid=431. Treat tid=453 as the richest currently confirmed noncanonical cover-shell-only value: on the current 3-CID public matrix it returns a non-empty cover shell but still no video_ids, so it is not a field-equivalent replacement for 431. Treat tid=483 as a video_ids-led thin success shell. Treat tid=476 as a separate imgtag-family ultra-thin shell that now has dedicated demo/raw validation. Treat tid=506 as a separate empty-valued field shell that now also has dedicated demo/raw validation. Treat tid=537 as another thinner success-shell family for branch probing rather than a caller-default replacement.
api1.accepted_shape: single query key; tested repeated-key behavior is first-value-wins in the anonymous branch
api1.success_discriminator: Branch-sensitive: canonical tid=431 means top-level errorno=0 plus a non-empty cover row with a non-empty video_ids family; tid=453 now sits on a different positive cover-shell-only branch with non-empty title/type but video_ids_count=0; tid=483 keeps top-level success plus non-empty video_ids materialization while cover title/type stay empty; tid=476 now has dedicated evidence as an imgtag-family ultra-thin shell with 25 extra field keys and qbox_imgtag={} while title/type/video_ids stay empty; tid=506 now has dedicated evidence as an empty-valued field shell with 10 total fields, a 9-key extra-field family, and no non-empty extras while title/type/video_ids stay empty; tid=537 remains a thinner success-shell-without-sample family on the current 3-CID matrix.
api1.duplicate_key_semantics: repeated tid currently behaves as first-value-wins in the tested anonymous branch

key_failure_cases.errormsg: 错误的tid, 如果新申请的接口,请等待10分钟

api1.environment_open_reason: Broader API1 positive/success-shell tid space is still open and the newly mapped 431/453/476/483/506/537 families have not been replayed under aged-cookie or login-state.
still_open: Whether API1 has another positive or success-shell tid beyond the current 431/453/476/483/506/537 family map remains unclosed.

api1.recommended_fill_strategy: Use one idlist key with a comma-separated CID payload. Keep the non-empty item count <= 32.
api1.accepted_shape: single CSV value inside one idlist key
api1.success_discriminator: top-level errorno=0 plus at least one non-empty cover row; mixed valid+invalid batches can still return top-level success
api1.duplicate_key_semantics: repeated idlist currently behaves as first-value-wins in the tested same-day anonymous plus real anonymous visitor-cookie replay collision cases; it does not merge across query positions

counting_rule_for_limits.counted_unit: non-empty CSV item inside one idlist value
counting_rule_for_limits.empty_slots: ignored when surrounded by valid values
counting_rule_for_limits.duplicate_items: preserved and still count as non-empty items

key_failure_cases.errormsg: idlist个数错误, 为0或超过限制

api1.environment_open_reason: The CSV counting rule and repeated-key precedence are now strong in anonymous scope, but aged-cookie/login-state replay is still open for this row.
still_open: Aged-cookie/login-state replay is still open for this row.

api1.recommended_fill_strategy: For stable direct calls, keep the canonical numeric appid and its canonical appkey together. In the currently tested anonymous numeric slice, do not treat alternate numeric appid as one flat family: `appid=1` currently rides a success-bypass branch, far noncanonical numerics currently fall into `appid no find`, and the searched near-canonical band currently falls into an appkey-gated rejection family. Only use missing/text-like appid or alternate numerics when you intentionally want to probe those branch families.
api1.accepted_shape: canonical numeric appid activates stricter validation; missing/text-like appid currently lands on a looser tested anonymous branch; the tested numeric space is now at least three-way rather than a simple canonical-vs-other split
api1.success_discriminator: Canonical documented branch: appid=10001005 with matching appkey. In the current anonymous numeric slice, `appid=1` still succeeds on the looser bypass branch, far noncanonical numerics such as `2/3/10/100/1000/99999/10001000` currently return `10010108 / appid no find`, and the searched near-canonical numeric family `10001001-10001186` currently lands on `10010110 / appkey error`, with `10001005` acting as the isolated success point inside that searched region.
api1.duplicate_key_semantics: repeated appid/appkey collision cases currently behave as first-value-wins in the tested anonymous branch

key_failure_cases.when: appid=10001001-10001186 with the current canonical appkey

api1.environment_open_reason: The canonical pair is stable, but broader numeric appid space and cross-environment behavior are not closed.
still_open: Full numeric appid space is still not closed; the current evidence only narrows it to a tested three-family split plus explicit cutovers `10001000 -> 10001001` and `10001186 -> 10001187` in the searched anonymous region.

No evidence yet that appkey unlocks more than satisfying the exact canonical numeric-appid branch; the searched near-canonical numeric family still rejects the current canonical appkey across `10001001-10001186`.

api2.recommended_fill_strategy: Leave it omitted or set it to xml for normal callers. Use exact lowercase json only when you explicitly need JSONP.
api2.accepted_shape: missing or xml keeps XML; exact lowercase json switches into JSONP
api2.success_discriminator: otype only changes the wrapper family. Success still depends on the tid/idlist branch underneath it.
api2.duplicate_key_semantics: repeated otype currently behaves as first-value-wins in the tested anonymous branch
api2.environment_open_reason: Only XML default and lowercase JSONP are positively confirmed so far.
still_open: No positive wrapper value is confirmed beyond XML default and lowercase JSONP.

api2.recommended_fill_strategy: Use tid=535 when you want the richest currently confirmed detail row. Use tid=502 when a richer alternate positive shell with duration+vid+cover_list is sufficient but canonical 535 is not required. Use tid=488/540/541 only when thinner shell-level success is acceptable on the current 3-VID anonymous public matrix, and treat tid=506 only as a success-shell probe rather than a stable positive-detail recipe.
api2.accepted_shape: single query key; tested repeated-key behavior is first-value-wins in the anonymous branch

success_discriminator.tid_535: retcode=0 plus non-empty detail row, with canonical samples exposing duration/defn/state/upload_src
success_discriminator.tid_488: retcode=0 plus non-empty title/url currently means a thinner alternate positive shell; on the current 3-VID matrix duration/defn/state/upload_src/category_map/cover_list/vwh stayed empty
success_discriminator.tid_502: retcode=0 plus non-empty title/url/duration/vid/cover_list currently means a richer alternate positive shell, but still not a field-equivalent replacement for canonical 535
success_discriminator.tid_506: retcode=0 can still collapse into a near-empty success shell; on the current 3-VID matrix the caller-facing demo rows stayed effectively empty
success_discriminator.tid_540: retcode=0 plus non-empty title/url can still mean only an alternate positive shell; on the current 3-VID matrix duration stayed present while defn/state/upload_src/category_map/cover_list/vwh stayed empty
success_discriminator.tid_541: retcode=0 plus non-empty title/url can still mean an even thinner alternate positive shell; on the current 3-VID matrix duration, defn, state, upload_src, category_map, cover_list, and vwh all stayed empty

api2.duplicate_key_semantics: repeated tid currently behaves as first-value-wins in the tested anonymous branch

key_failure_cases.errormsg: 错误的tid, 如果新申请的接口,请等待10分钟

api2.environment_open_reason: Positive tid discovery outside the current 488/502/506/535/540/541 family map is still open overall, but the anonymous 524-529 lower-edge band is now tighter and the 456-521 mid-corridor now has stable positive/success-shell islands rather than a flat error band.
still_open: Positive tid space beyond the current 488/502/506/535/540/541 family map is still open outside the tightened anonymous 524-529 lower-edge band and the newly mapped 456-521 mid-corridor islands.
Aged-cookie/login-state replay is still missing for environment-sensitive branch closure.
Do not upgrade tid=488/502/540/541 into environment-invariant equivalents of tid=535 before aged/login replay outputs exist.

Dedicated caller-facing validation now confirms tid=506 as a near-empty success shell in the anonymous direct-call scope; do not upgrade it into a stable positive-detail branch without new non-empty evidence.

api2.recommended_fill_strategy: Keep 3 for canonical calls. Do not hard-code this parameter as globally irrelevant; current evidence is only scoped-negative.
api2.accepted_shape: string-like query value; many tested values still stayed on the same visible branch in anonymous scope
api2.success_discriminator: Changing union_platform has not changed visible row shape in current anonymous same-day runs, real anonymous visitor-cookie replay, or the tested 535/540/541 anonymous sweep. That is not a global no-op proof.
api2.duplicate_key_semantics: repeated union_platform currently shows no observed order effect in the tested anonymous XML branch, but that does not prove a general parser rule
unlocked_capabilities: no distinct capability unlocked in current tested environments

candidate_parameter_families.recommended_fill_strategy: Only use callback with otype=json and only when you explicitly need a custom JSONP wrapper.
candidate_parameter_families.current_effect: Many values raw-passthrough into the wrapper prefix. Empty callback falls back to the default QZOutputJson shell. Repeated callback now behaves as first-value-wins in the tested same-day anonymous JSONP collision cases, and wrong-appkey JSONP error shells still honor callback wrapper changes. Known parse-breaking representatives now include a(, ((, })();, and the later widened unmatched-delimiter / odd-prefix representatives [(, {(, /*(, a[(, )(, ](, and }(, while [ and [[ still remain raw passthrough in the tested branch.
candidate_parameter_families.success_discriminator: A changed wrapper prefix does not automatically mean a changed payload branch; some callback values only change parseability at the wrapper level, but both success JSONP shells and tested wrong-appkey JSONP error shells still honor callback precedence in anonymous scope.
still_open: Aged-cookie/login-state replay is still open for callback precedence and error-shell behavior.
Broader parser-breaking families remain open beyond the newly widened unmatched-delimiter / odd-prefix representatives.
Current callback precedence and error-shell wording is still scoped to anonymous plus real-anonymous replay evidence.

candidate_parameter_families.recommended_fill_strategy: Do not depend on token/sign/sig/appver/access_token/authkey/openid to unlock capability in anonymous direct calls. Keep them out unless you are deliberately replaying an authenticated or session-coupled hypothesis.
candidate_parameter_families.current_effect: No observed visible split in the tested anonymous canonical branches or in the later real anonymous visitor-cookie replay on API1 tid=431 and API2 tid family 535/540/541.
candidate_parameter_families.success_discriminator: Current evidence only supports a scoped-negative reading: no observed effect so far, not a global no-op proof.
candidate_parameter_families.environment_open_reason: These keys remain one of the highest-value environment-sensitive candidate families.
still_open: Whether any auth-leaning key becomes meaningful only under aged-cookie or login-state environments.
Current evidence is only scoped-negative; do not promote this family into a global no-op claim before aged/login replay outputs exist.

candidate_parameter_families.recommended_fill_strategy: Do not depend on reserved-looking format/version/platform/source-like keys to unlock capability in direct calls. Keep them out unless you are deliberately extending the reserved-key hunt beyond the current tested anonymous set.
candidate_parameter_families.current_effect: No observed visible split across the tested anonymous canonical branches or the later real anonymous visitor-cookie replay on API1 XML, API2 XML, or API2 JSONP. On the tested API2 JSONP branch, these keys also did not change the wrapper root away from the baseline QZOutputJson assignment shell.
candidate_parameter_families.success_discriminator: Current evidence supports a stronger mostly-closed negative reading than the auth-ish family: the tested keys behaved as ignored extras in the current anonymous scope, but this is still not a proof that every reserved-looking key is globally inert.
candidate_parameter_families.environment_open_reason: The first reserved-looking sweep is now closed for the tested anonymous key set plus the later real anonymous visitor-cookie replay, but aged/login replay and broader reserved-key discovery are still open.
still_open: Whether a narrower reserved-looking key family exists outside the currently tested set `format/output/version/v/platform/source`.
Whether any reserved-looking key changes behavior only under aged-cookie or login-state environments.
